build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../server && TAURI_ENV_PLATFORM= npm run dashboard:build && cd ../desktop && bash scripts/bundle-server.sh

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; connect-src ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
